title: Lineage Record
description: Schema for a single lineage record capturing one transformation step in the GCP mirror data pipeline. Each record represents a verifiable link in the provenance chain.

event_id.description: Unique lineage event identifier. Format: LIN-{timestamp_sequence}.

event_type.description: Type of pipeline transformation this event represents.

slice.description: The slice that performed the transformation.

input_ref.description: Reference to the input data element (e.g., GCP record ID, submission ID, detail ID).

input_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input data.

output_ref.description: Reference to the output data element.

output_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the output data.

predecessor_event_id.description: Event ID of the immediately preceding lineage event in the chain.

detail_id.description: Canonical detail ID this event relates to, if applicable.

context.description: Additional context about the transformation (e.g., rules applied, mappings used).

duration_ms.description: Duration of the transformation in milliseconds.

error_details.description: Error details if status is 'failed' or 'partial'.
